summary.key_theme: Meta 正積極透過 AI 訂閱制與硬體開發推動營收多元化，但高額的 AI 基礎設施資本支出與法律訴訟風險仍是投資人關注的焦點。

bullish.title: Meta Expands Beyond Ads With Paid Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp And AI Subscription
bullish.reason: Meta 推出全球付費訂閱計畫，標誌著公司試圖降低對廣告收入的依賴，開拓新的營收成長曲線。

bullish.title: Here’s Why Meta (META) is Among the 12 Most Profitable Stocks to Invest In
bullish.reason: Meta 的高獲利能力持續吸引長期投資人，顯示其核心廣告業務依然強勁。

bullish.title: Meta plans AI pendant, 'wearables for work' in hardware boost
bullish.reason: 公司計畫開發 AI 穿戴式裝置，顯示其在 AI 硬體領域的野心，有助於擴大生態系。

bullish.title: Mark Zuckerberg Drops Hints Cloud Wars With Amazon And Microsoft Is 'Definitely On The Table'
bullish.reason: 執行長 Mark Zuckerberg 暗示可能進軍雲端運算市場，若成真將為公司帶來新的長期成長動能。

bullish.title: A Strategy On Meta Stock Has A Large Profit Zone With Little Upside Risk
bullish.reason: 技術面分析顯示該股具備良好的風險報酬比，吸引交易型投資人關注。

bullish.title: Meta Platforms (META) Up 3.8% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
bullish.reason: 財報後股價表現穩健，市場對其後續成長動能保持正面期待。

bullish.title: Here’s What Made Meta Platforms (META) Impax US Sustainable Economy Fund’s Leading Contributor
bullish.reason: 獲得永續基金青睞，顯示公司在 ESG 治理與財務表現上獲得機構投資人認可。

bullish.title: Meet This Pick-and-Shovel AI Stock That Just Joined Meta, Tesla, and Broadcom as the Newest Member of the $1 Trillion Club
bullish.reason: Meta 持續被視為 AI 領域的領頭羊，維持其在兆元市值俱樂部的地位。

bearish.title: Bank of America has a stark message for Meta stock investors
bearish.reason: 美銀指出 Meta 在 2026 年 AI 基礎設施支出高達 1,250 億至 1,450 億美元，導致自由現金流顯著下滑，引發獲利能力擔憂。

bearish.title: Meta, TikTok, Snap, and YouTube settle school lawsuit for $27M
bearish.reason: Meta 與其他社群媒體平台因青少年身心健康問題達成和解，雖然金額不大，但凸顯了持續的法律與監管風險。

bearish.title: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
bearish.reason: 市場質疑 Meta 除了廣告以外的變現能力，過去的多元化嘗試多以失敗告終，AI 轉型仍有不確定性。

bearish.title: Is Meta Platforms, Inc. (META) In Trouble Over Financial Scams On Platforms?
bearish.reason: 平台上的金融詐騙問題持續引發監管與聲譽風險，可能影響用戶信任度。

bearish.title: Is This AI Stock a Buy After Dropping 20% From Its All-Time High?
bearish.reason: 股價自高點回調 20%，反映市場對其成長動能與 AI 投入回報的疑慮。

bearish.title: Meta paid $9 million to settle Kentucky school district’s lawsuit
bearish.reason: 針對特定學區的訴訟和解，進一步加深了公司在平台責任方面的負面形象。

neutral.title: Meta Platforms Investors Reject Proposals as Zuckerberg Bets Big on AI
neutral.reason: 股東否決了多項外部提案，顯示管理層對公司方向的掌控力穩固，未對股價造成重大波動。

neutral.title: 1 Thing Investors Should Know About Meta's New Subscription Strategy
neutral.reason: 針對 AI 聊天機器人訂閱制的分析，屬於對既有策略的補充說明。

neutral.title: Meta Platforms Is Testing AI Chatbot Subscriptions. What to Know.
neutral.reason: 報導 Meta 測試付費訂閱的細節，屬於中性資訊揭露。

neutral.title: Should Meta’s New Meta One Subscriptions and AI Spending Shift Require Action?
neutral.reason: 投資建議類文章，探討是否需要調整持股，未提供明確買賣訊號。

neutral.title: This Tiny Social Media Stock May Deserve a Second Chance
neutral.reason: 提及 Pinterest 的競爭，對 Meta 本身影響有限。

neutral.title: Meta Shareholders Reject Proposal On Dual Class Capital Structure
neutral.reason: 股東會投票結果彙整，屬於例行性公司治理資訊。
